name: No Bake Buffalo Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour milk, cocoa, vanilla and sugar into a pan.
2. Cook on medium-high until it comes to a steady boil.
3. Reduce heat and turn off the burner.
4. Add butter and allow it to melt before adding peanut butter.
5. Stir in oats until the mixture is firm.
6. Drop spoonfuls onto wax paper.
7. Let sit for an hour before removing from the paper.
